title: Magical Moist Filipino Coconut Leche Flan
description: A traditional Filipino dessert with a moist and creamy texture, featuring coconut and a caramelized sugar crust. This leche flan is a perfect treat for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and water and heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
Increase the heat to medium-high and bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, sweetened condensed milk, coconut milk, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add the melted butter to the egg mixture and whisk until well combined.
Strain the egg mixture into a clean bowl to remove any air bubbles.
Pour the egg mixture into 6 small ramekins or custard cups.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake the leche flan for 45 minutes, or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the leche flan from the water bath and let it cool to room temperature.
Cover the leche flan with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
